pros: The most helpful aspect of the robotic assistance was that it allowed us to focus solely on assembly rather than searching for specific components. Another positive aspect of the robotic assistance was that the robot handled the car’s assembly plan, and the operator knew exactly what to do step by step.
cons: One thing I would improve is the processing time to make it faster, shorten the approval time for subsequent work stages, or possibly switch to a fully automated work stage approval system. This would result in a faster and more efficient human-robot collaboration system.
comments_overall: Working with the robot was very straightforward and easy to understand. The system itself is certainly very useful; the only thing I would improve is to make the entire collaboration between humans and robots happen automatically, without the need to approve each step, or perhaps reduce the number of steps requiring approval so that the collaboration can proceed more quickly and be more efficient.
